items.name_en: M13922 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Bag! A classic from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series, reinterpreting the Monogram pattern with the artist Takashi Murakami's signature rainbow tones. The Monogram features a smartphone-specific pocket and can also hold keys, a passport, credit cards, and cash. Easily store personal essentials, the perfect travel companion. Size 19Cmx10cm.

items.name_en: M13408 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Bag Louis Vuitton SARAH Wallet series classic! Murakami interior design clever, with many pockets and card slots. items.name_en: M14178 Black & Color! LV x TM Passport Cover This classic Louis Vuitton x Murakami series passport cover is crafted from coated canvas with a simple design, embellished with the Monogram pattern reinterpreted in the iconic rainbow tones of artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing a lively playful style and adding a sophisticated touch to the journey. The passport cover is lined with calfskin and features multiple business card slots and pockets, making it exceptionally practical.

items.name_en: M14163 Black & Color! LV x TM Victorine Wallet This miniature Victorine Wallet from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series is small and exquisite, with a colorful Monogram pattern reinterpreting Louis Vuitton's classic logo in the famous rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The wallet is made of coated canvas, featuring a refined calfskin lining and silver metal fittings, and is equipped with a zippered coin pocket, with multiple compartments inside for bills and business cards.

items.name_en: M13399 Black & Color! LV x TM Rosalie Coin Purse This Rosalie coin purse is designed to be small, with a rounded front flap fastened by a gold button, an elegant daily essential. This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series coin purse is made of bright Monogram coated canvas, inspired by the signature style of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The coin purse features a zippered coin pocket inside, perfectly accented with a matching colorful Monogram pull tab.

items.name_en: M13409 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Coin Purse This timeless Louis Vuitton x Murakami series zipper coin purse combines practical function with a playful style, appearing even more vibrant this season. The coin purse is made of Monongram coated canvas and paired with cheerful rainbow tones, paying tribute to the distinctive color style of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The coin purse features a silver zipper and multiple internal compartments, keeping coins, bills, and business cards neatly organized.

items.name_en: M13403 Black & Colorful! LV x TM Card Holder. This replica of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami collaboration series offers a playful new interpretation with rainbow tones. items.name_cn:
💖 Full set of original counter packaging 💖 [New] The iconic GG Supreme canvas makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 Early Autumn collection, reinterpreting the new floral print with blue tones. This beige and dark brown full-zip wallet is embellished with a modern floral pattern and GG logo.
Beige and dark brown GG Supreme canvas
All-over blue floral print
Cloud print fabric lining
Inside: 12 card slots, 3 bill compartments, and 1 zip coin pocket
Zip closure
Model: 841150
Size: 19cm (W) x 10.5cm (H) x 2.5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 230g
Color: Brown embossed / Original leather.
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】Inspired by the brand's heritage, the circular interlocking double-G motif adds a touch of elegance to accessories in matte blue calfskin. On this matte blue calfskin card holder, this 1970s-style motif radiates timeless charm. The interior is thoughtfully designed with multiple slots for versatile use.
